nodes.context: Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in Portici and San Sebastiano al Vesuvio, active since 1970s.
Neapolitan criminal organization; Vollaro clan is a member.
Camorra clan; fought a war with Vollaro clan in 2001-2002.
Powerful Camorra clan from Piazzolla di Nola led by Carmine Alfieri.
Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo; opposed by Vollaro clan.
Coalition of anti-Cutolo clans formed to contrast NCO.
More powerful Camorra clan that may fill the void left by weakening Vollaro clan.
Camorra clan; at war with Vollaro clan as of 2019.

edges.evidence_quote: The Vollaro clan has fought two Cammora wars. The first between 1977 and 1997, was an internal war plagued by a score of murders and the other, in late 2001 and early 2002, was with the Cozzilino clan.
edges.context: Vollaro clan fought a war with Cozzilino clan in 2001-2002.

edges.evidence_quote: The Vollaro clan was one of the first clans to take sides with the powerful Alfieri clan from Piazzolla di Nola, led by Carmine Alfieri against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).
edges.context: Vollaro clan allied with Alfieri clan against NCO.

edges.evidence_quote: The Vollaro clan was one of the first clans to take sides with the powerful Alfieri clan from Piazzolla di Nola, led by Carmine Alfieri against the Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).
edges.context: Vollaro clan opposed NCO by siding with Alfieri clan.

edges.evidence_quote: It was also one of the first clans to join the Nuova Famiglia (NF), a coalition of anti-Cutolo clans which was formed to contrast the growing power of the NCO.
edges.context: Vollaro clan joined the Nuova Famiglia coalition against NCO.

edges.evidence_quote: Its weakening is likely to pave the way for the more powerful Sarno clan.
edges.context: Sarno clan may expand as Vollaro clan weakens, but no direct relationship asserted.

edges.evidence_quote: After the murder of Ciro D'Anna, affiliate of the clan, on December 23, 2019, news emerged that the Vollaro clan would be at war with the Mazzarella clan, due to the interests of the latter in expanding their territories into the Vollaro's zone of influence.
edges.context: Vollaro clan at war with Mazzarella clan as of 2019.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Ascione clan, Abate clan (defunct), Giuliano clan (defunct), Anastasio clan, Veneruso clan, Marfella clan
edges.context: Ascione clan is an ally of Vollaro clan per infobox.
